title: Hooke Laboratories
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/hooke-laboratories-inc/345976723 Hooke Laboratories is a biotechnology company based in Lawrence, Massachusetts, specializing in biological products for medical and pharmaceutical research.They are best known for their "Hooke Kits™," which are ready-to-use emulsions used to induce animal models of autoimmune diseases, such as EAE, in laboratory rodents.The company operates strictly as a preclinical research supplier, working only with rodents and in vitro, and does not offer any products for human clinical use
